class.name: E3DModelManager
class.brief_description: High-level manager for loading and caching E3D model resources.
class.description: [E3DModelManager] handles the loading of MaSzyna [code].e3d[/code] models from the filesystem. It resolves paths based on the configured MaSzyna game directory and utilizes [ResourceCache] to provide persistent disk caching. Cached resources are loaded without reusing Godot's global resource cache so hot reload can rebuild extension-backed resources safely.

method.name: load_model
method.description: Loads the specified model from the given [param data_path] and [param file_name]. The method first checks [ResourceCache] for a cached disk snapshot. If the cached resource cannot be restored as a valid [E3DModel], the stale cache entry is discarded and the original [code].e3d[/code] file is parsed again before being saved back to cache.
